name: Hawaiian Fruit Platter
recipeIngredient: 3 fresh pineapple slices (unpeeled), cut into 8 wedges
2 medium oranges, unpeeled, sliced and halved
1 papaya, peeled, seeded, cut into wedges
1/2 pound red grapes, broken into small clusters
1/2 cup frozen pineapple juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. On a large serving platter, arrange the pineapple, kiwi fruit, oranges, papaya, star fruit, and grapes.
2. Toss the banana slices with lime juice. Drain off any excess liquid, reserving the lime juice. Arrange the bananas over the fruit on the platter.
3. In a small bowl, combine the reserved lime juice and thawed pineapple juice concentrate; blend well. Drizzle this mixture over the fruit. Sprinkle with coconut.
Makes 10 servings.
